title: Connect boards from a form entry

posts.author: EPerez (Estefanie Perez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! I was wondering if there was a way to create an automation similar to the one below but that read: “When an item is created in another board (FORM BOARD), connect the item where this column (NAME) matches this column (NAME) in this board (MASTER VENDOR LIST) by this logic” or some work around (general caster, mirror, connect board) to make this happen.

I have a form board that is filled out by vendors, and I would like the information that they complete to show in my master vendor board.

Form example:

Screen Shot 2022-01-31 at 1.04.16 PM1170×988 47.7 KB

Form board looks like this when there is a new entry:
Screen Shot 2022-01-31 at 1.04.37 PM2398×232 23.9 KB

I would like for columns “Received Confirmation” and “RFP Response-File” to be show in the Master Vendor List board without having to manually select the connection for each entry.

Thanks!

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @EPerez

It sounds similar to something I worked on a few months ago for a client - give the below recipe a try and see if that fits your requirement. It can take some setting up to get it all connected so let me know if you have any questions on this! Feel free to shoot me an email via peta@upstreamtech.io or set a time with me using the below link and we can look at it together.

image798×210 10.7 KB

Book a meeting here!

Kind regards,
